task: Block 28 — Vendor Lock-in Analysis: 11 vendors documented with severity scoring
prior_state: NET-NEW — no vendor lock-in analysis existed on main
details: docs/runbooks/vendor-lockin-analysis.md: 11 vendors covered (Render, Neon, Samsara, QBO, Plaid, ComData, Relay, Sentry, OpenAI/Anthropic, Postmark, DNS)
Each vendor has: what we depend on, cost of leaving (eng hours), acceptable alternatives, mitigation, lock-in severity (Low/Medium/High), renewal/contract info, monthly cost
Key finding: Samsara is the only HIGH severity due to ELD hardware on every truck
Mitigation: IH35 owns all data in portable standard formats
